description: Node.js webgpu-doe helper API benchmark: Doe helper vs raw Dawn WebGPU

doe-api.notes: Doe helper API (gpu.compute, gpu.kernel, gpu.buffer) on Doe N-API runtime

dawn.notes: Raw WebGPU API via Dawn N-API bindings

comparability.notes: Both providers measured at JS API boundary. Left uses webgpu-doe helpers, right uses raw WebGPU. Both dispatch identical GPU work and readback.

claimability.notes: Doe helper API must beat raw Dawn at both p50 and p95 with >=19 timed samples.
